body: {"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"unsafe field \"title\"","fingerprint":"9a9f3e7563c088c6559b50170a909615619d5996d3af04d242043c3656f19c85","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"rewrite_rejected","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.rewrite_rejected","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment"}

{"rationale":"Verification, parent/deps, wired assertion, and sufficient-prompt criteria pass, but the title is descriptive rather than imperative, the description lacks file:line-grounded current-state evidence for the root cause, and the labels are missing an area facet and explicit cross-reference facet.","score":5,"suggested_fixes":["Rewrite the title as an imperative scope, e.g. 'Add federation integration test for coordinator-to-spoke operatorPromptSubmit identity attestation'.","Add file:line references in ROOT CAUSE for the two-server forwarding path and the identity-header/attestation handling code.","Add an area label and explicit cross-reference labels so the label set covers phase, area, kind, and cross-reference facets."],"waivers_applied":[]}
